Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-28-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS SOSHCACE LLC AND SOSHACE OU'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

Appearance via Zoom:
Amarachukwu Ndukwe of Gryphon Law (212.931.1890, andukwe@gryphon.law) for petitioners and moving parties;
No other appearances.

The matter is discussed as to the issue of service. The court takes the matter under submission and will review the proof of service submitted on March 19, 2026. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)

Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-06-2026 Continued To Apr-14-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS SOSHACE LLC, AND SOSHACE OU'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

No appearances. The court grants the parties' request to continue the matter to April 14, 2026. Counsel notified via email on March 5, 2026. Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)

Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Continued To Mar-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. Plaintiff contests the court's teantive ruling.

PETITIONERS SOSHACE LLC, SOSHACE OU'S Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award. Plaintiff contests the Court's tentative ruling. The motion is continued to March 6, 2026 for oral argument.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)

**The court did not recieve Plantiff's notice of contest email in contestdept301tr.org. Plaintiff's notice of contest was received in calendar301.org mail box at 3:14 p.m. This notice of contest was not seen by the clerk, and on the day 2/27/26 minutes were entered adopting the Court's tentive ruling. I received a phone call from plaintiff stating that he did send a contest eamil timely and wanted to have argument on March 6, 2026. Plaintiff also stated that he has not been able to have contact with defedants. Per Judge Kahn, the matter is continued for argument to March 6, 2026. ***
